assignments.description: Used in the next decision to determine if we need to prompt for contact relationship review.
assignments.name: ACR_Count
assignments.label: ACR Count

assignments.name: Assign_Account_to_Work_On_From_Existing_ACR
assignments.label: Assign Account to Work On From Existing ACR

assignments.name: Assign_Account_to_Work_On_From_Existing_Household
assignments.label: Assign Account to Work On From Existing Household

assignments.name: Assign_Account_to_Work_On_From_Is_Household
assignments.label: Assign Account to Work On From Is Household

assignments.name: Assign_Account_to_Work_On_From_New_Household
assignments.label: Assign Account to Work On From New Household

assignments.name: Assign_Combined_ACR_to_New_ACR_List
assignments.label: Assign Combined ACR to New ACR List

assignments.description: Adding the NewSingleACR variable from the loop to a Distinct ACR list to denote which ones will need a Person Contact Id.
assignments.name: Assign_for_new_Person_Creation
assignments.label: Assign for new Person Creation

assignments.name: Assign_Group_Flags_for_Active_Prepopulated
assignments.label: Assign Group Flags for Active Prepopulated

assignments.name: Assign_Group_Flags_for_Existing_Active_Added
assignments.label: Assign Group Flags for Existing Active Added

assignments.name: Assign_Group_Flags_for_Existing_Not_Active_Added
assignments.label: Assign Group Flags for Existing Not Active Added

assignments.name: Assign_Group_Flags_for_New_Active_Added
assignments.label: Assign Group Flags for New Active Added

assignments.name: Assign_Group_Flags_for_New_Not_Active_Added
assignments.label: Assign Group Flags for New Not Active Added

assignments.name: Assign_Group_Flags_for_Not_Active_Prepopulated
assignments.label: Assign Group Flags for Not Active Prepopulated

assignments.description: Assigns the NewSingleACR variable to the ACRsToCreateUpdate list.
assignments.name: Assign_Other_ACR_Values_for_Added
assignments.label: Assign Single ACR to Collection

assignments.name: Assign_Other_ACR_Values_for_Exisiting_Added
assignments.label: Assign Other ACR Values for Exisiting Added

assignments.name: Assign_Other_ACR_Values_for_New_Added
assignments.label: Assign Other ACR Values for New Added

assignments.name: Assign_Other_ACR_Values_for_Prepopulated
assignments.label: Assign Other ACR Values for Prepopulated

assignments.description: Separate from the next assignment set as we only want to set this ACR as primary by default if we are creating a new account
assignments.name: Assign_Person_as_Primary_for_ACR_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Person as Primary for ACR Variable

assignments.description: Need to assign the person to the variable to ensure they are part of the new household.
assignments.name: Assign_Person_Other_ACR_Variables
assignments.label: Assign Person Other ACR Variables

assignments.description: Standalone (utility bar) launches have no source Person Account, so Decision_Has_Original_Person skips the primary assignment. Default IsPrimaryMember to true so the first card on Screen 2 renders with Primary pre-checked and users don't hit the "exactly one primary" validation wall.
assignments.name: Assign_Primary_Default_for_Standalone
assignments.label: Assign Primary Default for Standalone Launch

assignments.name: Clear_Single_ACR_for_Prepopulated
assignments.label: Clear Single ACR for Prepopulated

assignments.name: Increment_Primary_Count_Existing_Added
assignments.label: Increment Primary Count - Existing Added

assignments.name: Increment_Primary_Count_New_Added
assignments.label: Increment Primary Count - New Added

assignments.name: Increment_Primary_Count_Prepopulated
assignments.label: Increment Primary Count - Prepopulated

assignments.description: So that if the next item in the loop is a new person the value won't be set.
assignments.name: Remove_Contact_ID_from_NewACRSingle
assignments.label: Remove Contact ID from NewACRSingle

assignments.name: Reset_Primary_Count
assignments.label: Reset Primary Count

assignments.name: Set_Household_Delete_Succeeded
assignments.label: Set Household Delete Succeeded

assignments.name: Set_Is_New_Household
assignments.label: Set Is New Household

choices.description: Setting custom choices for ACR to simplify the Roles List.
choices.name: ACRRoleHouseholdMember

choices.description: Setting custom choices for ACR to simplify the Roles List.
choices.name: ACRRoleOther

decisions.description: If the member is active and set with role = household member, then we want to ensure the standard checkbox fields related to Party Relationship Groups are properly set (at this point we do this for future-proofing).
decisions.name: Check_Added_Items_for_Existing_Active_Members
decisions.label: Check Added Items for Existing Active Members

decisions.description: If the member is active and set with role = household member, then we want to ensure the standard checkbox fields related to Party Relationship Groups are properly set (at this point we do this for future-proofing).
decisions.name: Check_Added_Items_for_New_Active_Members
decisions.label: Check Added Items for New Active Members

decisions.name: Check_Added_New_or_Existing_Members
decisions.label: Check Added New or Existing Members

decisions.description: To avoid duplicating the Get ACRs and the Assign Person Variables components. We only need to assign the person we are working with to the Get ACR variable if they are not already in the household.
decisions.name: Check_for_New_ACR
decisions.label: Check for New ACR

decisions.name: Check_for_other_ACRs_for_Contacts_Decision
decisions.label: Check for other ACRs for Contacts Decision

decisions.description: If the member is active and set with role = household member, then we want to ensure the standard checkbox fields related to Party Relationship Groups are properly set (at this point we do this for future-proofing).
decisions.name: Check_Prepopulated_Items_for_Active_Household_Members
decisions.label: Check Prepopulated Items for Active Household Members

decisions.description: Checks whether the flow was launched from a Person Account. If PersonContactId is populated the original person should be added to the new household. If not (standalone launch), skip directly to Manage Household Members.
decisions.name: Decision_Has_Original_Person
decisions.label: Launched From Person Account?

decisions.description: Determines the next step, or completes the flow.
decisions.name: Return_to_Add_New_Member
decisions.label: Return to Add New Member?

rules.name: Other
rules.label: NEW Return to Add New Members

Flow.description: Screen flow launched from the Account record page to manage household membership. Allows users to add or remove household members (AccountContactRelation records), set the primary contact, configure address and phone sync preferences, and create or delete the household account when needed.

formulas.description: Used when a new household is initially created. BLANKVALUE guards against standalone (utility-bar) launches where Get_Account is null — those produce an empty FirstName/LastName, which would create a Household named "'s Household". The household is renamed by SMQS_Household_Setup_Name_Sync_AccountContactRelationship_to_Account once the first primary ACR is committed; the CPA name is then corrected by SMQS_Household_Setup_Name_Sync_Account_to_CPA.
formulas.name: NewHouseholdDefaultName
formulas.expression: IF(ISBLANK({!Get_Account.FirstName}) && ISBLANK({!Get_Account.LastName}), "New Household", TRIM(BLANKVALUE({!Get_Account.FirstName}, "") & " " & BLANKVALUE({!Get_Account.LastName}, "")) & "'s Household")

formulas.description: For use within the new person loop.
formulas.name: NewPersonPhoneFormula

Flow.label: SMQS Screen Manage Household

loops.description: Loops through added items from Manage Household Members recurring element. Will include both newly created contacts and existing contacts from the database.
loops.name: Loop_Added_Household_Members
loops.label: Loop Added Household Members

loops.description: Loops through the prepopulated items. May include a new ACR (no ACR Id) if household is new, or if the original person was not yet a member of the selected household.
loops.name: Loop_Prepopulated_Household_Members
loops.label: Loop Prepopulated Household Members

recordCreates.description: Party Relationship Group will be created by a separate record-triggered flow.
recordCreates.name: Create_New_Household_Account
recordCreates.label: Create New Household Account

recordLookups.description: Contacts can only be an Active household Member of one household. Here we search for other household memberships for our contact list.
recordLookups.name: Check_for_other_ACRs_for_Contacts
recordLookups.label: Check for other ACRs for Contacts

recordLookups.description: Assumes the recordId variable is populated at the start of the flow with either an Account ID or a Contact ID.
recordLookups.name: Get_Account
recordLookups.label: Get Account

recordLookups.description: Need to capture account parameters to use for Person creation in the following loop. Will also need the details later on for Household Naming screen.
recordLookups.name: Get_Account_To_Work_On_Details
recordLookups.label: Get Account To Work On Details

recordLookups.description: Cannot use the Update Create ACRs list as it only contains ACR Ids
recordLookups.name: Get_ACRs_For_Contact_Choice
recordLookups.label: Get ACRs For Contact Choice

recordLookups.description: Finds the ACRs if the original account is a person account.
recordLookups.name: Get_Existing_ACRs
recordLookups.label: Get Existing ACRs

recordLookups.name: Get_Existing_CCRs_between_Household_Members
recordLookups.label: Get Existing CCRs between Household Members

recordLookups.description: To be used for creating a new Household
recordLookups.name: Get_Household_Record_Type_ID
recordLookups.label: Get Household Record Type ID

screens.description: Displays existing CCRs, new CCRs and an option to add more CCRs. We create all the CCRs once the user is done.
screens.name: Add_New_Member_CCR_Relationships
screens.label: Add New Member Relationships

fields.name: AddNewCCRRadioChoice
fields.fieldText: Would you like to add a new relationship between contacts?

fields.name: CCR_Contact
fields.fieldText: First individual

fields.name: CCR_Related_Contact
fields.fieldText: Second individual

fields.name: NewCCR_DisplayText_RoleQuestion
fields.fieldText: What is {!CCR_Contact}'s relationship to {!CCR_Related_Contact}?

fields.name: NewCCR_Select_Role
fields.fieldText: Select role:

fields.name: CCR_RelationshipExplainer
fields.fieldText: {!CCR_Contact} is {!CCR_Related_Contact}'s {!NewCCR_Select_Role}.

fields.name: NewCCR_Active
fields.fieldText: Active relationship

fields.name: NewCCR_Start_Date
fields.fieldText: Start Date

fields.name: NewCCR_End_Date
fields.fieldText: End Date

screens.description: Flags that this person is already in a household. Prompts them to manage the existing household. We are enforcing through this flow that someone can only have an active membership to one household.
screens.name: Already_In_Household
screens.label: Already In Household

fields.name: AlreadyInHouseholdDisplayText
fields.fieldText:
{!Get_Account.Name} is already active in a household. Continue to update the {!ExistingHouseholdACRs.firstSelectedRow.Account_Name__c} members.


If you need to add {!Get_Account.Name} to a different Household, please first deactivate them from the current household on the following screens.

screens.description: Prompts the user to create a new household or link to an existing one.
screens.name: Create_New_Or_Existing_Household
screens.label: Create New Or Existing Household

fields.name: Create_New_Household
fields.fieldText: Create new household

fields.name: Create_New_Household_Header
fields.fieldText: New Household Information

fields.name: HouseholdMemberErrorDisplay
fields.fieldText:
Warning: you have selected to add or activate people who are already an active member of another household.


To proceed, click 'Previous' and for the individuals in the table below, unselect the checkbox that marks them as active members of the household.

fields.name: PrimaryCountErrorText
fields.fieldText:
Warning: exactly one member must be marked as the primary member of the household.


To proceed, click 'Previous' and ensure exactly one member has the 'Primary member of the household' checkbox selected.

fields.name: ErrorMessage
fields.fieldText:
The screen flow "Manage Household" has failed. Please send this message to your administrator.


Triggering record: {!recordId} - {!Get_Account.Name}


Household: {!AccountToWorkOn.Id} - {!AccountToWorkOn.Name}


Fault Message: {!$Flow.FaultMessage}


Current Stage: {!$Flow.CurrentStage}

fields.name: RollbackSuccessNote
fields.fieldText: Note: The empty household account ({!AccountToWorkOn.Name}) was automatically removed from the system.

fields.name: RollbackFailedNote
fields.fieldText: Note: A new household account ({!AccountToWorkOn.Name} - {!AccountToWorkOn.Id}) was created but could not be automatically removed. Please ask your administrator to delete it manually.

screens.description: References existing ACRs and allows creation of new. User should use the Active checkbox instead of the "Remove existing" feature (which should be deactivated) in the recurring element. There will therefore be no "Removed" loop following this screen.
screens.name: Manage_Household_Members
screens.label: Manage Household Members

fields.name: ManageMembersDisplayText
fields.fieldText: Manage the household members for {!AccountToWorkOn.Name}.

fields.name: Create_New_Person
fields.fieldText: Create a new individual

fields.name: FirstName
fields.fieldText: First Name

fields.name: LastName
fields.fieldText: Last Name

fields.name: Salutation
fields.fieldText: Salutation

fields.name: ActiveScreenBox
fields.fieldText: Active member of the household

fields.name: Is_Primary_Member_of_Household
fields.fieldText: Primary member of the household (only one member can be selected as primary)

fields.name: SyncHouseholdAddress
fields.fieldText: Person's mailing address should match the household's address

fields.name: SyncHouseholdPhone
fields.fieldText: Person's home phone should match the household's phone

fields.name: NoMembersDisplayText
fields.fieldText:
There are currently no active members in this household to continue with household management.


Click 'Finish' to complete the flow or 'Previous' to add active household members.

screens.name: Screen_Not_a_Person_or_Household
screens.label: Screen Not a Person or Household

fields.name: DisplayNotAPersonOrHousehold
fields.fieldText:
You may only use the manage household flow from a person or household record.


Review the 'Record Type' field or the 'Is Household?' field to make sure that the record is correct. If it is correct, contact your admin and report the issue.

﻿

transforms.name: Join_New_Person_Accounts_and_ACRs
transforms.label: Join New Person Accounts and ACRs

transforms.name: New_Person_Account_IDs_to_List
transforms.label: New Person Account IDs to List

transforms.description: Cannot reference a record collection variable in the next "In" query.
transforms.name: Transform_ACR_Ids_into_Text
transforms.label: Transform ACR Ids into Text

transforms.description: To use for the Get Existing CCRs "in" query.
transforms.name: Transform_Contact_Ids_to_Text
transforms.label: Transform Contact Ids to Text

transforms.description: For some reason we can't map to the lookup fields on the ACR in the previous Join, so we have to use this Transform to create the ACRs.
transforms.name: Transform_to_ACRs
transforms.label: Transform to ACRs

variables.description: Populated in loops after the Manage Household Member screen. Used to create/update ACRs
variables.name: ACRsToCreateUpdate

variables.description: Used in determining if we need to ask about relationships
variables.name: CountACRs

variables.description: For loop to add to NewACRs
variables.name: NewSingleACR

variables.description: Captures the ACR parameters so they can be included in the Manage Household Members Screen
variables.name: SingleACRForOriginalPerson
